Main Series Home | Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl Home | Battle Tower Home

Battle Tower Pokémon

The following Pokémon are used in the Battle Tower. Every individual species used in the Battle Tower can have multiple movesets associated with them. Unlike other generations, not all Pokémon have the same number of movesets, and Pokémon are only really grouped by whether they appear in the Regular Class or Master Class.

The common way of referring to a Pokémon with multiple sets is to identify the set with a number, e.g. "Set2 Rayquaza", "Rayquaza1", or "Rayquaza-3". In some documentation, sets may instead be referred to with the number given in the below table ("999 Rayquaza"). For my tables, I will be using the "Rayquaza-1" method of referring to sets.

  • Regular Class
  • Master Class

Some additional resources:

  • SadisticMystic's Battle Tower spreadsheet (make a copy of it from this sheet) contains the Trainer information and is the source I used for this page.


Regular Class
